description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run tests that triggers on push to the new_cleanup branch. Run a matrix of tests across Python 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10 on an ubuntu-latest environment. For each Python version, checkout the repository, install dependencies from requirements.txt and a script install_dependencies.sh, then run various tests including sampling tests, gifmaze tests, misc tests, and tests for polytopes, uniform tilings, catacaustics, Mobius, and assassin puzzles.
